description: Infrastructure and solution-health dashboard spanning accepted raw ingest, resolver scan lag, repair backlog, repair throughput, and recent resolver history.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value FROM naap.accepted_raw_events WHERE ingested_at >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))

SELECT toFloat64(greatest(dateDiff('second', max(ingested_at), now()), 0)) AS value FROM naap.accepted_raw_events WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))

WITH raw AS (SELECT max(ingested_at) AS raw_max FROM naap.accepted_raw_events WHERE event_type IN ('stream_trace', 'ai_stream_status', 'ai_stream_events', 'network_capabilities') AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))), wm AS (SELECT max(last_ingested_at) AS wm_max FROM naap.resolver_runtime_state FINAL) SELECT toFloat64(greatest(dateDiff('second', ifNull(wm_max, raw_max), raw_max), 0)) AS value FROM raw CROSS JOIN wm
SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value FROM naap.resolver_dirty_partitions FINAL WHERE status = 'pending' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))

SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value FROM naap.resolver_dirty_partitions FINAL WHERE status = 'success' AND updated_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))

SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value FROM naap.resolver_runs WHERE status = 'skipped_claimed' AND finished_at >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), ifNull(org, '')))

SELECT toStartOfInterval(event_ts, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS time, event_type AS stage, count() AS events_per_minute FROM naap.accepted_raw_events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_ts) AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) GROUP BY time, stage ORDER BY time

SELECT started_at AS "Started", ifNull(finished_at, cast(null, 'Nullable(DateTime64(3, \'UTC\'))')) AS "Finished", mode AS "Mode", status AS "Status", ifNull(org, 'all') AS "Org", rows_processed AS "Rows Processed", if(finished_at IS NOT NULL, toUInt64(greatest(dateDiff('second', started_at, finished_at), 0)), cast(null, 'Nullable(UInt64)')) AS "Elapsed (s)", if(finished_at IS NOT NULL AND dateDiff('second', started_at, finished_at) > 0, round(toFloat64(rows_processed) / toFloat64(dateDiff('second', started_at, finished_at)), 2), cast(null, 'Nullable(Float64)')) AS "Rows/s", mismatch_count AS "Mismatches", ifNull(error_summary, '') AS "Error Summary" FROM naap.resolver_runs WHERE started_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), ifNull(org, ''))) ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT toStartOfInterval(updated_at, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AS time, status, count() AS partitions FROM naap.resolver_dirty_partitions FINAL WHERE updated_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND status IN ('success', 'failed') AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) GROUP BY time, status ORDER BY time

WITH pending AS (
    SELECT org,
        toString(event_date) AS event_date,
        status,
        reason,
        toString(first_dirty_at) AS first_dirty,
        toString(last_dirty_at) AS last_dirty,
        toUInt64(attempt_count) AS attempts
    FROM naap.resolver_dirty_partitions FINAL
    WHERE status IN ('pending', 'failed')
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
)
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT org AS "Org",
        event_date AS "Event Date",
        status AS "Status",
        reason AS "Reason",
        first_dirty AS "First Dirty",
        last_dirty AS "Last Dirty",
        attempts AS "Attempts"
    FROM pending
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'all' AS "Org",
        '' AS "Event Date",
        'none' AS "Status",
        'no pending or failed historical repairs' AS "Reason",
        '' AS "First Dirty",
        '' AS "Last Dirty",
        toUInt64(0) AS "Attempts"
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pending)
)
ORDER BY "Event Date" ASC, "Org" ASC
LIMIT 100

SELECT attribution_status AS "Status", attribution_reason AS "Reason", count() AS "Sessions" FROM naap.canonical_session_current_store FINAL WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) GROUP BY attribution_status, attribution_reason ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT started_at AS "Started", ifNull(finished_at, cast(null, 'Nullable(DateTime64(3, \'UTC\'))')) AS "Finished", org AS "Org", event_date AS "Event Date", status AS "Status", rows_processed AS "Rows Processed", if(finished_at IS NOT NULL, toUInt64(greatest(dateDiff('second', started_at, finished_at), 0)), cast(null, 'Nullable(UInt64)')) AS "Elapsed (s)", if(finished_at IS NOT NULL AND dateDiff('second', started_at, finished_at) > 0, round(toFloat64(rows_processed) / toFloat64(dateDiff('second', started_at, finished_at)), 2), cast(null, 'Nullable(Float64)')) AS "Rows/s", mismatch_count AS "Mismatches", ifNull(error_summary, '') AS "Error Summary" FROM naap.resolver_backfill_runs WHERE started_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 100

WITH raw_days AS (
    SELECT org, toDate(event_ts) AS event_date
    FROM naap.accepted_raw_events
    WHERE toDate(event_ts) < today()
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
    GROUP BY org, event_date
)
SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value FROM raw_days

WITH raw_days AS (
    SELECT org, toDate(event_ts) AS event_date
    FROM naap.accepted_raw_events
    WHERE toDate(event_ts) < today()
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
    GROUP BY org, event_date
), repaired_days AS (
    SELECT org, event_date
    FROM naap.resolver_backfill_runs
    WHERE status = 'success'
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
    GROUP BY org, event_date
)
SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value
FROM raw_days
LEFT JOIN repaired_days USING (org, event_date)
WHERE repaired_days.org IS NULL

WITH raw_days AS (
    SELECT org, toDate(event_ts) AS event_date
    FROM naap.accepted_raw_events
    WHERE toDate(event_ts) < today()
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
    GROUP BY org, event_date
), repaired_days AS (
    SELECT org, event_date
    FROM naap.resolver_backfill_runs
    WHERE status = 'success'
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
    GROUP BY org, event_date
)
SELECT if(count() > 0, 100.0 * toFloat64(countIf(repaired_days.org IS NOT NULL)) / toFloat64(count()), 100.0) AS value
FROM raw_days
LEFT JOIN repaired_days USING (org, event_date)

WITH raw_days AS (
    SELECT org, toDate(event_ts) AS event_date
    FROM naap.accepted_raw_events
    WHERE toDate(event_ts) < today()
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
    GROUP BY org, event_date
), repaired_days AS (
    SELECT org, event_date
    FROM naap.resolver_backfill_runs
    WHERE status = 'success'
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
    GROUP BY org, event_date
)
SELECT toFloat64(ifNull(max(dateDiff('day', raw_days.event_date, today())), 0)) AS value
FROM raw_days
LEFT JOIN repaired_days USING (org, event_date)
WHERE repaired_days.org IS NULL

WITH raw_days AS (
    SELECT org, toDate(event_ts) AS event_date
    FROM naap.accepted_raw_events
    WHERE toDate(event_ts) < today()
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
    GROUP BY org, event_date
), repaired_days AS (
    SELECT org, event_date
    FROM naap.resolver_backfill_runs
    WHERE status = 'success'
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
    GROUP BY org, event_date
), pending AS (
    SELECT raw_days.org AS org,
        toString(raw_days.event_date) AS event_date,
        toUInt64(dateDiff('day', raw_days.event_date, today())) AS age_days,
        'waiting_for_first_successful_historical_run' AS reason
    FROM raw_days
    LEFT JOIN repaired_days USING (org, event_date)
    WHERE repaired_days.org IS NULL
)
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT org AS "Org",
        event_date AS "Event Date",
        age_days AS "Age (days)",
        reason AS "Reason"
    FROM pending
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'all' AS "Org",
        '' AS "Event Date",
        toUInt64(0) AS "Age (days)",
        'no unrepaired closed historical org-days' AS "Reason"
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pending)
)
ORDER BY "Age (days)" DESC, "Org" ASC
LIMIT 100

panels.description: Alert signal for NaapRequestResponseDuplicateRowsPresent. Fires when duplicate canonical job rows are present in the last 24 hours.

targets.rawSql: SELECT job_type, duplicate_rows FROM (SELECT 'ai-batch' AS job_type, greatest(toInt64(count()) - toInt64(uniqExact(request_id)), 0) AS duplicate_rows FROM naap.canonical_ai_batch_jobs WHERE $__timeFilter(completed_at) UNION ALL SELECT 'byoc' AS job_type, greatest(toInt64(count()) - toInt64(uniqExact(request_id)), 0) AS duplicate_rows FROM naap.canonical_byoc_jobs WHERE $__timeFilter(completed_at)) ORDER BY duplicate_rows DESC, job_type

panels.title: Request/Response Duplicate Rows

panels.description: Alert signal for NaapRequestResponseCanonicalCoverageLow. Fires when canonical request-response job coverage falls below 98 percent after the 20-source-job guard.

targets.rawSql:
WITH source_counts AS (
  SELECT 'ai-batch' AS job_type, count() AS source_jobs
  FROM naap.normalized_ai_batch_job FINAL
  WHERE subtype = 'ai_batch_request_completed'
    AND request_id != ''
    AND event_ts >= now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'byoc' AS job_type, count() AS source_jobs
  FROM naap.normalized_byoc_job FINAL
  WHERE subtype = 'job_gateway_completed'
    AND event_ts >= now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR
), canonical_counts AS (
  SELECT 'ai-batch' AS job_type, count() AS canonical_jobs
  FROM naap.canonical_ai_batch_jobs
  WHERE completed_at >= now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'byoc' AS job_type, count() AS canonical_jobs
  FROM naap.canonical_byoc_jobs
  WHERE completed_at >= now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR
)
SELECT s.job_type, s.source_jobs, ifNull(c.canonical_jobs, 0) AS canonical_jobs,
  round(ifNull(c.canonical_jobs, 0) * 100.0 / nullIf(toFloat64(s.source_jobs), 0), 2) AS coverage_pct
FROM source_counts s
LEFT JOIN canonical_counts c ON s.job_type = c.job_type
WHERE s.source_jobs >= 20
ORDER BY coverage_pct ASC, s.job_type

panels.title: Request/Response Canonical Coverage

panels.description: Alert signal for NaapRequestResponseDensityCollapse. Fires when the previous full hour falls below 20 percent of the trailing 24 hour median hourly job count for a job_type and pipeline_id pair.

targets.rawSql:
WITH current_bucket AS (
  SELECT toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AS window_start
), current_counts AS (
  SELECT job_type, pipeline_id, sum(job_count) AS current_jobs
  FROM naap.api_requests_demand
  WHERE window_start = (SELECT window_start FROM current_bucket)
  GROUP BY job_type, pipeline_id
), historical_counts AS (
  SELECT job_type, pipeline_id, window_start, sum(job_count) AS hourly_jobs
  FROM naap.api_requests_demand
  WHERE window_start >= (SELECT window_start FROM current_bucket) - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
    AND window_start < (SELECT window_start FROM current_bucket)
  GROUP BY job_type, pipeline_id, window_start
), baselines AS (
  SELECT job_type, pipeline_id, quantileExact(0.5)(hourly_jobs) AS baseline_jobs
  FROM historical_counts
  GROUP BY job_type, pipeline_id
)
SELECT b.job_type, b.pipeline_id, ifNull(c.current_jobs, 0) AS current_jobs, b.baseline_jobs,
  round(ifNull(c.current_jobs, 0) * 100.0 / nullIf(toFloat64(b.baseline_jobs), 0), 2) AS density_pct
FROM baselines b
LEFT JOIN current_counts c ON c.job_type = b.job_type AND c.pipeline_id = b.pipeline_id
WHERE b.baseline_jobs >= 20
ORDER BY density_pct ASC, b.job_type, b.pipeline_id
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Request/Response Density Collapse Watch

panels.description: Alert signal for NaapStreamingHealthSignalCoverageLow. Fires when the previous published hour falls below 60 percent health-signal coverage after the 50-requested-session guard.

targets.rawSql:
WITH current_bucket AS (
  SELECT toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AS window_start
)
SELECT pipeline_id AS "Pipeline",
  sum(requested_sessions) AS "Requested Sessions",
  round(if(sum(health_expected_signal_count) = 0,
    1.0,
    sum(health_signal_count) / toFloat64(sum(health_expected_signal_count))
  ) * 100, 2) AS "Coverage %"
FROM naap.api_network_demand
WHERE window_start = (SELECT window_start FROM current_bucket)
  AND pipeline_id != ''
GROUP BY pipeline_id
HAVING sum(requested_sessions) >= 50
ORDER BY "Coverage %" ASC, "Pipeline"

panels.title: Streaming Health-Signal Coverage

panels.description: Alert signal for NaapStreamingUnservedDemandHigh. Fires when the previous published hour exceeds a 40 percent effective failure rate for a gateway and pipeline pair after the 50-requested-session guard.

targets.rawSql:
WITH current_bucket AS (
  SELECT toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AS window_start
)
SELECT gateway_label AS "Gateway",
  pipeline_id AS "Pipeline",
  sum(requested_sessions) AS "Requested Sessions",
  sum(effective_failed_sessions) AS "Unserved Sessions",
  round(sum(effective_failed_sessions) * 100.0 / nullIf(toFloat64(sum(requested_sessions)), 0), 2) AS "Unserved %"
FROM (
  SELECT ifNull(nullIf(gateway, ''), 'unattributed_gateway') AS gateway_label,
    pipeline_id,
    requested_sessions,
    effective_failed_sessions
  FROM naap.api_network_demand_by_org
  WHERE window_start = (SELECT window_start FROM current_bucket)
    AND pipeline_id != ''
)
GROUP BY gateway_label, pipeline_id
HAVING sum(requested_sessions) >= 50
ORDER BY "Unserved %" DESC, "Requested Sessions" DESC
LIMIT 25

panels.title: Streaming Unserved Demand Rate

panels.description: Alert signal for NaapStreamingDemandDensityCollapse. Fires when the previous full hour falls below 20 percent of the trailing 24 hour median hourly requested-session count for a pipeline.

targets.rawSql:
WITH current_bucket AS (
  SELECT toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AS window_start
), current_counts AS (
  SELECT pipeline_id, sum(requested_sessions) AS current_requested
  FROM naap.api_network_demand
  WHERE window_start = (SELECT window_start FROM current_bucket)
    AND pipeline_id != ''
  GROUP BY pipeline_id
), historical_counts AS (
  SELECT pipeline_id, window_start, sum(requested_sessions) AS hourly_requested
  FROM naap.api_network_demand
  WHERE window_start >= (SELECT window_start FROM current_bucket) - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
    AND window_start < (SELECT window_start FROM current_bucket)
    AND pipeline_id != ''
  GROUP BY pipeline_id, window_start
), baselines AS (
  SELECT pipeline_id, quantileExact(0.5)(hourly_requested) AS baseline_requested
  FROM historical_counts
  GROUP BY pipeline_id
)
SELECT b.pipeline_id AS "Pipeline", ifNull(c.current_requested, 0) AS "Current Requested",
  b.baseline_requested AS "Baseline Requested",
  round(ifNull(c.current_requested, 0) * 100.0 / nullIf(toFloat64(b.baseline_requested), 0), 2) AS "Density %"
FROM baselines b
LEFT JOIN current_counts c ON c.pipeline_id = b.pipeline_id
WHERE b.baseline_requested >= 50
ORDER BY "Density %" ASC, "Pipeline"
LIMIT 25

panels.title: Streaming Demand Density

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT org FROM (SELECT org FROM naap.accepted_raw_events WHERE org != '' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.api_status_samples WHERE org != '' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.api_active_stream_state WHERE org != '' UNION ALL SELECT ifNull(org, '') AS org FROM naap.resolver_dirty_partitions FINAL WHERE ifNull(org, '') != '' UNION ALL SELECT ifNull(org, '') AS org FROM naap.resolver_runs WHERE ifNull(org, '') != '') AS orgs WHERE org != '' ORDER BY org
list.label: Org
list.name: org
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT org FROM (SELECT org FROM naap.accepted_raw_events WHERE org != '' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.api_status_samples WHERE org != '' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.api_active_stream_state WHERE org != '' UNION ALL SELECT ifNull(org, '') AS org FROM naap.resolver_dirty_partitions FINAL WHERE ifNull(org, '') != '' UNION ALL SELECT ifNull(org, '') AS org FROM naap.resolver_runs WHERE ifNull(org, '') != '') AS orgs WHERE org != '' ORDER BY org

title: NaaP: System Health
